### resource_roadmap

>  resource_roadmap ()

*Resource: pointer to roadmap.ipynb if it exists.*

### resource_heartbeat

>  resource_heartbeat ()

*Resource: MCP heartbeat for persistency monitoring.*

Returns current timestamp and uptime info. If this resource fails to
respond, the MCP server is likely down and needs restart.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/resources.py#L279"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>
